description:
2018 Mercedes AMG C63 S Coupe, 4.0 TC V8 RWD, 503bhp, 9 Speed Auto. AED 199,000 or AED 3,781 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 4 Years. 
 - Mileage only 75,811KM - Full Mercedes Service History - 12 Month Blackline Warranty - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Designo Iridium Silver Magno - Two Tone Leather Nappa Leather White Pearl/Black - Panoramic Sliding Sunroof - Keyless Entry - Push To Start - Heated - Electric Parking Brake - Brake Assist - Head-Up Display - Burmester Surround Sound System - Carbon Fiber Interior Trim - Electric Tailgate - Driving Assistance Package - AMG Night Package - Ambient Lighting - 360 Surround View Camera - Air Filtration - ISOFIX Child Seats - Apple Car Play - Android Auto - Navigation
